name: INGOP
subject: Volunteer for the INGOP 2026 State Convention
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
Join the team! No images? [Click here](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-e-ahrtiz-hhlljjcji-j/) [Click Here to Fill out the Volunteer Form](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahrtiz-hhlljjcji-r/) Good afternoon,In just over two months, Hoosier Republican delegates will gather in Fort Wayne (June 19th-20th) to nominate our party's candidates, adopt our party's platform, and set a course for our party's future!In preparation for this summer's State Convention, we are putting together a team of more than 100 volunteers! With thousands of delegates and attendees, no State Convention would be possible without the work of committed volunteers.If you are available and interested in taking part in this year's State Convention as a volunteer, please fill out the form below. While we cannot provide hotel rooms, meals will be provided, and volunteers will have access to our hospitality suites!While we will try to accommodate everyone who desires to volunteer, please wait for a member of our team to reach out and confirm your spot.This will be a statewide effort, and we deeply appreciate any support you can offer in finding committed Republicans to help us put on a successful State Convention.Very best,
**INGOP Team** [Click Here to Fill out the Volunteer Form](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahrtiz-hhlljjcji-y/) ** PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. ****NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. ****WWW.INDIANA.GOP.** | Indiana Republican State Committee 101 W. OHIO ST., SUITE 2200 INDIANAPOLIS, IN 46204 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com [Preferences](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.updatemyprofile.com/y-ahrtiz-293A8D27-hhlljjcji-h) | [Unsubscribe](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-u-ahrtiz-hhlljjcji-k/)
---

name: Danielle Bethell for Governor
subject: Oregon’s economy isn’t where it should be
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Danielle Bethell PAC 20220 [Preferences](https://daniellebethell
body:
We’re ranking near the bottom in business climate and economic competitiveness.
[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahjhrx-hhlrhljhit-r/) Friends,I've been going through [Oregon's latest economic scorecard](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahjhrx-hhlrhljhit-y/), and it lines up with what I'm hearing across the state.Oregon isn't where it should be.We're ranking near the bottom in business climate and economic competitiveness. Growth is slowing. At the same time, the cost of living keeps climbing, and families are feeling the pressure.This isn't one issue. It's a pattern.When the economy isn't working, everything else gets harder, housing, jobs, public safety, and the ability for communities to stay stable.I see that firsthand as a county commissioner. [Donate Today](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahjhrx-hhlrhljhit-j/) Local governments are stepping in where they can, but too often we're working around state decisions instead of being supported by them.That has to change.Oregon needs leadership that is focused on growth, accountability, and making systems work again. That means supporting businesses, reducing unnecessary barriers, and being responsible with taxpayer dollars.It also means being willing to step in and fix what isn't working, not manage around it.That's the approach I've taken in Marion County, and it's the approach I'll bring as governor.We're in a competitive race, and we're in the stretch where momentum matters.If you believe Oregon can do better, I'm asking you to step in and help us get there.[Please consider making a contribution today.](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahjhrx-hhlrhljhit-t/)Danielle Bethell
Republican for Governor**P.S.** Every dollar makes a difference in a race like this. If you've been considering getting involved, now is a good time to do it. [Donate Today](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahjhrx-hhlrhljhit-i/) [](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahjhrx-hhlrhljhit-d/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahjhrx-hhlrhljhit-h/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahjhrx-hhlrhljhit-k/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahjhrx-hhlrhljhit-x/) | [ Share ](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-fb-ahjhrx-hhlrhljhit-m/) | [ Tweet ](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-tw-ahjhrx-hhlrhljhit-c/) | [ Share ](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-li-ahjhrx-hhlrhljhit-q/) | [ Forward ](https://daniellebethell.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-hhlrhljhit-E19159AE-ahjhrx-l-a)
---|---|---|---
Paid for by Friends of Danielle Bethell PAC 20220 [Preferences](https://daniellebethell.updatemyprofile.com/y-ahjhrx-E19159AE-hhlrhljhit-f) | [Unsubscribe](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-u-ahjhrx-hhlrhljhit-z/)
